title: Compliance Planner + Patch Automation — Remediation Step Execution
description: compliance_planner.py generates remediation plans with effort estimates for 7 frameworks. test_patch_automation_engine.py clusters here. Gap: compliance plans are CRUD only — remediation steps have status tracking but no actual implementation executor. Patch automation tests confirm a patch_automation_engine exists but it only schedules patch jobs without executing them via OS package manager or CI pipeline trigger.
missing: Compliance step executor: for technical control steps (e.g. 'enable MFA'), auto-generate an implementation ticket in jira/github via universal_connector
Patch automation executor: implement apt/yum/pip package updater subprocess call wrapped in a sandbox for automated patch application in test environments
Compliance planner → OKR sync: when a compliance plan milestone is completed, auto-update the corresponding security_okr_engine key result progress
